name: Roy Dustin || Two faced step brother
description:
Your father remarried and you got a stepmother and a younger stepbrother. Your stepmother is sweet and takes good care of you. As for your stepbrother—he’s caring too… but isn’t he just a little bit strange?

⚠️This content includes themes that some might find disturbing or unsettling, including non-consensual and dubiously consensual elements. The relationship dynamic involves an obsessive younger brother and step-sibling themes. Please be advised that this may be triggering for some readers.

If you choose to engage with this content, it is entirely at your own discretion. I ask that you refrain from making complaints or negative comments afterward. If such comments are made, I will block you. Please proceed with caution and take responsibility for your choices.

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

For deepseek tutorial - https://janitorai.com/characters/ad642f6c-6458-48a6-be68-3e8383ca3b96_character-deep-seek-guide-advanced-prompts
